content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

March 29, 1990

Arvin Skyrud  
1424 Lassen Avenue  
Milpitas, CA 95035

Re: Your Request for Confirmation of Telephone Advice  
Our File No. A-90-201

Dear Mr. Skyrud:

We have received your letter dated March 13, 1990 seeking written confirmation of the telephone advice provided to you by this agency on March 8, 1990 regarding your responsibilities and duties as a planning commissioner and candidate for city council, under the campaign contributions and conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act ("the Act").1

Your letter accurately summarizes the advice that you were provided. We concluded that the planning commission's approval of a landscape plan in January 1990 was a prerequisite to the city's final approval, and issuance of building permits, for the Planned Unit Development. Based on this conclusion, we advised that Section 84308 prohibits you from soliciting or receiving contributions of $250 from parties to and participants in the landscape plan proceeding, during the three months after the decision in that proceeding.

I trust this letter has provided you with the guidance you requested. If you have any further questions regarding this matter please contact me at (916) 322-5091.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan  
General Counsel

By: Jonathan S. Rothman  
Counsel, Legal Division

KED:JSR:plh

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
